home.heroTitle: Open a topic. Join the comments. Meet in rooms.

home.noTopicsDesc: Open the first topic and start the discussion.

landing.heroTitle: Don't let your thoughts get lost. Open a topic.
landing.heroSubtitle: A noise-free, permanent, and structured discussion space for developers. Build your technical knowledge base, not your scroll time.
landing.heroNote: Free forever. Sign up in 30 seconds.
landing.trustText: Built for developers and engineering teams working at
landing.showcaseTitle: A clean, functional workspace designed for code.
landing.showcaseSubtitle: Native markdown rendering, deep nested discussions, and real-time co-working rooms tailored for developers.
landing.noiseDesc: Algorithmic clutter, sponsored posts, flat text with no syntax highlighting, and valuable engineering discussions that disappear in hours.
landing.signalDesc: Searchable and permanent knowledge base. Markdown support, syntax highlighting, and deep nesting to keep replies contextual.
landing.testimonialsSubtitle: Hear from developers and engineers who use Oroya to share knowledge and brainstorm technical architectures.
landing.t1Quote: Having developer discussions on typical social networks is exhausting. Oroya's permanent topics and nested replies are exactly what we've been missing for technical deep dives.
landing.t2Quote: The live Rooms feature is incredibly useful during production incidents. We brainstorm real-time, solve it, and then instantly archive the post-mortem as a searchable Topic.
landing.t3Quote: As a founder getting feedback from a technical audience, Oroya's deep comment nesting allows us to dissect specific code changes without losing the main thread's context.
landing.t4Quote: Finally, a platform that doesn't feel like another AI template landing page. It's fast, beautifully designed, and actually focused on high-quality technical content.
landing.featuresTitle: Built for knowledge sharing, not endless scrolling.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Step out of the noise. Get the structure and depth your engineering team needs.
landing.feature1Desc: Replies nest inside replies. Keep code discussions focused and in context.
landing.feature2Desc: Native markdown editor with syntax-highlighted code blocks and full-text search.
landing.feature3Desc: Synchronous, real-time spaces for brainstorming, debugging, and collaboration.
landing.comparisonSubtitle: How the same thought lives two very different lives.
landing.rowSearchTw: At the mercy of algorithm/chat history
landing.rowFormatTw: Flat text with no code styling
landing.ctaTitle: Step out of the noise. Build the signal.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Start documenting your technical knowledge today. Persistent, searchable, and clean.
landing.ctaLogin: Already have an account? Sign in
landing.mockupTitle: Multi-Tenant PostgreSQL Architecture in SaaS Applications
landing.mockupDesc: Our schema-based isolation architecture to provide database-level isolation for our SaaS project. We dynamically create schemas for each tenant:
landing.mockupReply: Connection pool limits might be an issue when creating dynamic schemas. Have you considered Flyway or Liquibase for managing migrations when tenant count exceeds 500?
landing.footerTagline: A structured developer Q&A and collaboration workspace.

pricing.title: Join the community free, upgrade as you grow.
pricing.subtitle: Oroya is free for topic-focused discussions. Move to Pro or Ultra when you want more control, deeper content, and priority access.
pricing.note: All prices are in USD and processed via Paddle. VAT/local taxes are shown at checkout.
pricing.ctaDesc: Reach out if you need help with plans, billing, or subscriptions. We're happy to clarify the purchase experience.
pricing.freePlanTagline: Join the community, start the discussion.
pricing.ultraPlanTagline: For community builders and power users.

faq.a: Subscription payments via Paddle are launching very soon. This page shows the final pricing; purchase buttons will work once the payment infrastructure is enabled.
The monthly option renews every month, the yearly one every year. The yearly plan gives you two months off. Cancel anytime.

faq.q: Can I change my plan later?
faq.a: Yes. You can switch between Pro and Ultra anytime; the change takes effect at the next billing period.
All payments are processed by Paddle as the Merchant of Record. Card details are never stored on Oroya's servers.

meta.titleDefault: Oroya — Technical Knowledge Base and Developer Q&A Platform
meta.description: A noise-free, permanent, searchable, and Markdown-supported technical knowledge base platform for developers and engineering teams.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.description: These Terms explain the rules for accessing and using Oroya.
sections: 1. Introduction
By creating an account or using Oroya, you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, do not use the service.
2. Eligibility and Accounts
You must be at least 13 years old. Keep your account information accurate and your password secure. You are responsible for activity under your account.
3. Acceptable Use
Do not harass others, impersonate people, publish illegal content, spread malware, manipulate votes, scrape the service aggressively, or attempt unauthorized access.
4. User Content
You keep ownership of content you post and grant Oroya the limited rights needed to host, display, distribute, and operate that content within the service.
5. Moderation
Oroya may remove content or restrict accounts when necessary to protect users, enforce these Terms, or comply with law.
6. Paid Plans
Paid subscriptions renew according to the selected billing cycle until cancelled. Payments are processed by Paddle. Refunds are governed by the Refund Policy.
7. Service Availability
We work to keep Oroya available, but maintenance, technical failures, or events outside our control may interrupt access.
8. Account Closure
You may request account closure. Oroya may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms.
9. Changes
We may update these Terms. Material changes will be announced by email or within the service.
10. Contact
Questions about these Terms can be sent to support@fluxsphere.sbs.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: This Policy explains what data Oroya collects, how it is used, and how it is protected.
sections: 1. Information We Collect
We collect account details, profile information, content you publish, interactions, subscription status, and limited technical logs required to operate and secure the service.
2. How We Use Information
We use data to provide accounts, display content, authenticate users, send essential notices, process subscriptions, prevent abuse, moderate content, and improve reliability.
3. Payments
Payments are processed by Paddle. Oroya does not store complete payment-card details.
4. Cookies
Essential cookies and local storage maintain sessions, remember language preferences, and provide basic security.
5. Sharing
We do not sell personal data. Data is shared only with necessary service providers, when legally required, or to protect the service and its users.
6. Security and Retention
We use reasonable technical and organizational safeguards. Data is retained while your account is active and as reasonably required for backups, security, and legal obligations.
7. Your Rights
Depending on applicable law, you may request access, correction, deletion, restriction, objection, or portability of your personal data.
8. Children
Oroya is not intended for children under 13.
9. Contact
Privacy questions and requests can be sent to support@fluxsphere.sbs.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.description: This Policy explains subscription cancellation, refund eligibility, and support for billing issues.
sections: 1. Overview
Oroya paid plans are offered as monthly or annual subscriptions and remain active until the end of the paid billing period after cancellation.
2. Payment Provider
Paddle processes payments and approved refunds. Oroya does not store payment-card details.
3. Cancellation
You may cancel before the next renewal date. Access continues until the current billing period ends and no new renewal is charged.
4. Refund Eligibility
Annual plans may be eligible for a refund within 14 days and monthly plans within 7 days, subject to reasonable usage. Duplicate charges and unresolved paid-feature access failures may also qualify.
5. Request Process
Email support@fluxsphere.sbs from your account email with your username, plan, reason, and Paddle invoice details when available.
6. Processing Time
Approved refunds are normally returned through Paddle within 5–10 business days; bank processing times may vary.
7. Exclusions
Refunds are generally not provided outside the eligibility window, after substantial use, for simple changes of mind, abuse, or account termination caused by Terms violations.
8. Contact
For cancellation, refunds, or billing questions, contact support@fluxsphere.sbs.
